message:
fix(search): penalize unrefined documents in two-tier blended scoring

Updates semantic search configuration to use a shared
frankensearch_two_tier_config() factory and fixes QualityOnly mode
to explicitly disable fast_only. Also removes unused import warnings
for ROLE_ASSISTANT, ROLE_SYSTEM, ROLE_TOOL constants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
